title: LoTAS-Light
description: Tools for creating Tool-Assisted Speedruns in MC 1.21+
body:
LoTAS-Light
===========

Continuation of [LoTAS](https://modrinth.com/mod/lotas) for versions higher than 1.20.3, but with a reduced feature set

Needs **[Fabric-API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

Why remove features?
--------------------

1. Updating LoTAS to new versions was always very tedious due to the large feature set… Testing and verifying each feature was hard and with Mojangs faster release schedule, we could not keep up (especially if Mojang rewrites everything between minor versions)
2. Mojang patched a lot of things, so LoTAS's features would be reduced either way

Features
--------

### Improved `/tick` command

*   `/tick rate` supports tickrates lower than 1
*   A second `/tick freeze` by simply typing `/tick rate 0`, which also freezes the player
*   Tickrates higher than 20 also affect the player

### Tickrate keybinds

Same deal as LoTAS

*   `.` increases the tickrate
*   `,` decreases the tickrate
*   `F8` toggles `/tick rate 0`
*   `F9` advances 1 tick while the game is frozen

### Savestates

*   `/savestate` command for "quicksaving" and "quickloading" a minecraft world
*   `J` and `K` for saving and loading respectively

### Item Duplication
* Press Pause to save the game with the item in your inventory
* Throw out the item out of your inventory or put it in a chest
* Press `O`
* Rejoin the world

### Config
* `/lotaslight` for changing the config

No Multiplayer support!!
========================
The reason why this mod doesn't support multiplayer is simply: **Savestates**.  
Basically Mojang never intended a quickloading feature, so to load a different world,  
it is intended that you stop the Minecraft server (Imagine restarting and reconnecting to the server for every savestate).  
Changing this requires a *lot* of work, more than I am willing to put into this mod.
If you want to see (somewhat) working multiplayer savestates, check out [TASmod](https://modrinth.com/mod/tasmod)

# Translations
Help translate this mod with [Weblate](https://weblate.minecrafttas.com/projects/lotas-light/main/)

Bug reports and TASing help
===========================

Bugs can preferably reported on [GitHub](https://github.com/MinecraftTAS/LoTAS-Light/issues), but you can also use [Discord](https://discord.gg/jGhNxpd), where we also provide help!
